# Seeker Strike

## Observed Text

- Cost: 1
- Type/Rarity: Attack / Uncommon
- Target: AnyEnemy
- Base: Deal 9 damage. Choose 1 of 3 cards in your Draw Pile to add into your Hand.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Late value depends on whether the deck needs access more than raw damage; can find boss answers from the draw pile, but still adds an Attack and may be weak under Doormaker's Hunger exhaust tax.
